blocks.body: Plural nouns are nouns that refer to more than one subject. Basic rules: adding -s, -es or replacing -y with -ies. There are also exceptions and irregular plural forms.

{ "title": "10. Brief synopsis", "items": [ "Most nouns — just add -s: cat → cats, book → books.", "After s, x, z, ch, sh — add -es: box → boxes, bus → buses. days.", "Приголосна + y — змінюємо на -ies: baby → babies, city → cities.", "Голосна + y — просто додаємо -s: boy → boys, day → days.", "F / Fe - often change to -ves: knife → knives, leaf → leaves.", "Incorrect forms - you need to remember: man → men, child → children, sheep → sheep.", "Pronunciation -s: [s] after voiceless, [z] after sonorous, [ɪz] after sibilant.", "Some nouns are not change: sheep, fish, deer." ] }
